title: 🔥估值倒退回22年深熊
body: 市场处于历史级深熊周期。MVRV仅1.27，低于历史76%的时间，且数值低于上轮同期（2022-05）的1.32。当前估值已回归至上一轮熊市中期水平，叠加AHR999处于0.35的极端低位，市场已完成深度出清。结论：偏多。周期的黎明何时出现？
title_en: 🔥 Valuation reverts to '22 deep bear levels
body_en: The market is stuck in a historic deep bear cycle. MVRV is just 1.27, lower than 76% of historical data and below the 1.32 seen at this point in the last cycle (May '22). Valuation has returned to mid-bear market levels, and with AHR999 at an extreme low of 0.35, the market has completed a deep flush. Conclusion: Bullish. When will the dawn of the cycle break?
